note: OW05 Urayasu strait widening. rev 4 (rev 3 put the arc itself on land and the arc-on-land guard correctly refused, 1404 m > 400): the arc stays on the channel axis (rev 2 positions, arc_on_land 101 m) and the SOUTH bank is set by per-vertex widths that all reach lat 35.6266 -- effective channel after the edit_006 basin/wall refill = wall face 35.6326 down to 35.6266 ~ 665 m ~ 1.9h. Mouth vertices stay at 700 m so the upper block is only nibbled ~100 m.
